name: Update Locker

releases.author: Lemon695
releases.description: This release focuses on **stability improvements, marketplace readiness, and better mobile compatibility**, along with a broader internal architecture cleanup.¥r¥n¥r¥n# New and improved¥r¥n¥r¥n- **Modular architecture upgrade**¥r¥n  - Core features have been split into independent modules for better maintainability and future extensibility.¥r¥n  - The settings UI is now rendered dynamically based on registered modules.¥r¥n¥r¥n- **Plugin snapshots and restore**¥r¥n  - The plugin now backs up key files before locking:¥r¥n    - `main.js`¥r¥n    - `styles.css`¥r¥n    - `manifest.json`¥r¥n  - You can restore a plugin from a saved snapshot when needed.¥r¥n¥r¥n- **Release notes preview**¥r¥n  - The plugin can now try to fetch GitHub Release information for supported plugins.¥r¥n  - When repository information can be resolved, release notes can be previewed directly from the settings page.¥r¥n¥r¥n- **Compatibility checks**¥r¥n  - Added warnings for plugins whose `minAppVersion` may not match your current Obsidian version.¥r¥n  - Snapshot restore now performs a compatibility check before recovery.¥r¥n¥r¥n- **Improved config import/export**¥r¥n  - Config sync has been redesigned to use **vault-based JSON files**.¥r¥n  - Configurations are now exported into the current vault and can be imported from existing JSON files inside the vault.¥r¥n  - This improves **mobile compatibility** by removing reliance on browser downloads or system file pickers.¥r¥n¥r¥n- **UI and interaction polish**¥r¥n  - Improved grouping, status display, and action feedback in the settings page.¥r¥n  - Cleaned up hardcoded labels and inconsistent UI details.¥r¥n  - Expanded and unified English/Chinese interface text.
